name: Improving Molecular Property Prediction in Small Language Models Using Graph-based Tools
summary: arXiv:2607.13115v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Small language models (SLMs) have shown promise for zero-shot molecular property prediction from SMILES strings, yet they often suffer from structura...
description: arXiv:2607.13115v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Small language models (SLMs) have shown promise for zero-shot molecular property prediction from SMILES strings, yet they often suffer from structural blindness because sequence representations under-specify key graph-topological cues. We propose a modular Context-Augmented Prompting framework that enables agentic tool use at inference time: a tra...
author: Konstantinos Bougiatiotis, Dimitrios Kelesis, Georgios Paliouras
